hero.title: Create QR codes that work for you

features.title: Everything you need for your QR codes

dynamic.title: Dynamic QR codes

stats.title: Real-time analytics
stats.description: Scans per day, countries, cities, devices, systems and browsers.

design.title: Full customization
design.description: Colors, dot styles, corners and your logo at the center of the QR.

types.title: 20+ content types
types.description: Website, vCard, Wi-Fi, restaurant menu, PDF, MP3, event…

organize.title: Organization
organize.description: Folders, search, filters and duplication to find everything.

secure.title: Full control
secure.description: Enable, disable, protect with a password or an expiry date.

types.title: A QR code for every use case
types.subtitle: Pick a type, the form adapts.

one.title: Create
one.description: Choose a content type and fill in the form.

two.title: Customize

three.title: Share and measure
three.description: Download as PNG, SVG or PDF and track scans.
